violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Application proved to establishment at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

Sausages were observed held at (108-112) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview of staff sausages were put in the hot holding unit 3 hours prior to this inspection. -Proper hot holding reviewed. Staff opted to voluntarily dispose of the sausages. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Pastries in self-service area were observed not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the ( ) sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
There is an accumulation of debris surrounding dumpster. Dumpster was cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
There is an accumulation of debris surrounding dumpster. PIC stated dumpster area will be cleaned later today. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
